summary: Tested Top Performers feature: Backend API /api/rms/top-performers returning top 3 RMs sorted by events_closed (descending). Frontend displays 'This Month's Best' section with rank badges (1st, 2nd, 3rd), events closed count, leads managed, rating, and languages. Old static RM section removed. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed (desktop + mobile).
critical_code_review_comments: Top performers endpoint correctly filters out Test RMs (name starting with 'Test')
Events closed calculated as: booking_confirmed + event_completed counts
Sort uses events_closed as primary, total_leads as tiebreaker
Frontend fetches data on mount via useEffect, renders cards with RANK_STYLES
All required data-testids present: top-performers-section, top-performer-card-{0,1,2}, rank-badge-{0,1,2}, events-closed-{0,1,2}

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI tests passed - desktop and mobile)

seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing RM data (Rahul Sharma: 4 events, Amit Kumar: 2 events, Priya Singh: 1 event)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Top Performers feature fully tested. Key data-testids: top-performers-section, top-performer-card-{0,1,2}, rank-badge-{0,1,2}, events-closed-{0,1,2}. API: GET /api/rms/top-performers returns array sorted by events_closed desc. Limit param supported (default 3). Test RMs excluded. Current data: Rahul Sharma (4), Amit Kumar (2), Priya Singh (1).

backend_api.required_fields: PASS - user_id, name, picture, rating, events_closed, total_leads, languages

frontend_desktop.old_section_removed: PASS - 'Your Booking, Personally Managed' NOT present
frontend_desktop.3_performer_cards: PASS - card-0, card-1, card-2 all present
